'''''Aspiration''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] that came into the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Fleet]] right after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and joined [[Delak Krennel]] when he installed himself as the [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. It was on station around the [[Corvis Minor IV|fourth]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Corvis Minor system/Legends|Corvis Minor system]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] did not bother scanning ships that the commander assumed were part of the fleet and thus allowed the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' to jump in-[[Star system/Legends|system]] and recover the remains of a [[Battle of Distna|fight]] between [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and Krennel's [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIEs]].

{{Ship-stub}}
